title: Norway bans use of generative AI tools in elementary school to prevent ‌negative impact on learning
description: Norway is imposing a near ban on the use of generative AI tools by elementary school pupils while also restricting their ​use in the education of older children to prevent a ‌negative impact on learning. Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Stoere told a press ​conference that using AI increases the risk that young children skip important [...]

title: AI Talent Acquisition for Startups: How Early-Stage Teams Win the 2026 Hiring Race
description: Why AI talent acquisition is a startup’s hardest problem in 2026, and the practical playbook teams use to source, win, and build elite AI/ML hires.

title: Artificial intelligence enters medicine – and doctors receive new boundaries
description: The Israeli Medical Association has published a position paper that sets boundaries for the growing use of artificial intelligence systems in medicine.

title: The human skills AI still can’t replace
description: As AI reshapes work, experts say empathy, judgment, relationships, critical thinking and moral instincts remain essential advantages for human workers
